patches.find: (b) that SG gravimeters will show a 10–13 µGal pulse at C1/C4 in Aug 2026 (PRED-TIER-3). Whichever horn holds, the other fails.
patches.replace: (b) that SG gravimeters will show a 10–13 µGal pulse at C1/C4 in Aug 2026 (PRED-TIER-3). Whichever horn holds, the other fails. [Note: WIN-012 refers to this same August 2026 SG contact-phase test as PRED-TIER-2 ("−10 to −13 µGal pulse at C1/C4"); PRED-TIER-3 here is the same test phrased as "10–13 µGal in Level-3 residuals." The two IDs are partially overlapping entries for the same forward test — see WIN-012 for the magnitude-mismatch argument against the κ-derivation. ISS-1338.]
patches.rationale: WIN-012 uses PRED-TIER-2 and WIN-014 uses PRED-TIER-3 for the same August 2026 SG eclipse test. Adding a bracketed cross-reference reconciles the inconsistency without altering the argument.
